description_long: This is a tall, elegant vase with a flared rim and a rounded body, finished in a rich blue enamel. The surface is adorned with intricate gold filigree patterns, creating a shimmering effect across the body. Delicate white and yellow floral motifs with green leaves are painted on one side, adding a touch of natural beauty. The rim and base are accented with gold, and a green and red decorative band encircles the neck just below the rim. The vase appears to be made of metal, likely cloisonné, with a glossy, smooth finish. Its overall appearance suggests a decorative piece suitable for display in refined urban settings.
description: A tall, blue cloisonné vase with gold filigree, floral motifs, and a glossy finish, featuring a flared rim and ornate detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue body with gold filigree and a hint of floral design on the side, with the flared rim and gold accents clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vase's rounded profile and the continuation of the gold filigree pattern, with less floral detail visible.
description_view_2: Angled top view reveals the open mouth, the full extent of the floral motif, and the decorative band around the neck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the main cluster of white flowers and green leaves, with the gold filigree and rim details prominent.
